stories.title: Sources: U-M's May finalizing deal to coach Mavs
stories.summary: Michigan coach Dusty May is finalizing a deal to take the Dallas Mavericks' head coaching job, sources told ESPN, an axis-shifting move that significantly alters the college and NBA landscapes.

stories.title: Sources: Young to ink $212M deal with Wizards
stories.summary: Free agent Trae Young intends to sign a four-year, approximately $212 million deal to stay with the Wizards, with a player option in Year 4, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Messi breaks tie with Klose for most WC goals
stories.summary: Lionel Messi became the highest goal scorer in men's World Cup history Monday, moving up to 18 with a superb double in Argentina's Group J match against Austria.

stories.title: Sources: Celtics, Heat finalists for Giannis trade...
stories.summary: Giannis Antetokounmpo is expected to be traded before the start of the NBA draft Tuesday, with the Celtics and Heat emerging as finalists to land the Bucks superstar, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Keith Tkachuk makes HOF day after son's trade
stories.summary: Less than 24 hours after his sons became teammates when Brady was dealt from Ottawa to Florida, joining brother Matthew, Keith Tkachuk was elected into the Hall of Fame Monday after waiting for more than a decade and a half since his playing career ended.
